metadata.title: Synaply - Sinau Kosakata nganggo AI & Pengulangan Berjarak
metadata.description: Ningkatake katrampilan basa sampeyan nganggo pengulangan berjarak sing didhukung AI. Gawe dhaptar tembung khusus utawa sinau saka dhaptar umum sing dituduhake komunitas.
metadata.keywords: sinau basa inggris, pengulangan berjarak, pembangun kosakata, flashcards, sinau basa AI, dhaptar tembung, aplikasi sinau basa, sinau basa spanyol, sinau basa prancis, sinau basa jerman, kemahiran basa, apal tembung, sinau SRS
metadata.og_description: Ningkatake katrampilan basa sampeyan nganggo pengulangan berjarak sing didhukung AI. Sinau luwih cepet, eling luwih suwe.
metadata.og_image_alt: Tampilan Antarmuka Aplikasi Sinau Basa AI Synaply
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Sinau Tembung Anyar kanthi Gampang
metadata.twitter_description: Gabung karo Synaply kanggo nggedhekake kosakata sampeyan nggunakake pengulangan berjarak pinter lan AI.

common.title: Judhul
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Sinau {target} saka {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Jelajahi dhaptar tembung umum lan daftar puter saka pangguna liyane.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Ningkatake kosakata sampeyan kanthi nerjemahake ukara sing digawe AI adhedhasar topik apa wae utawa dhaptar tembung sampeyan.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Deleng, goleki, ubah, utawa busak tembung saka koleksi sampeyan.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Kita ora bisa nyimpen tembung anyar sampeyan. Ayo coba sepisan maneh!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Mangga pilih topik utawa ketik konteks sampeyan dhewe.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI bakal mbantu menehi definisi lan conto ukara
dashboard.auto_translate: Terjemahake kolom sing kosong kanthi otomatis
dashboard.delete_confirm: Apa sampeyan yakin arep mbusak tembung iki?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Apa sampeyan yakin arep mbusak KABEH tembung sampeyan? Tumindak iki ora bisa dibatalake.
dashboard.no_words_found: Ora ana tembung sing ditemokake. Coba tembung telusuran liyane utawa tambahake sawetara tembung!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Ora ana tembung sing ditemokake kanggo disinaoni. Mangga tambahake tembung anyar ing dhaptar sampeyan dhisik!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Sampeyan ora duwe tembung sing kudu ditinjau dina iki. Bali maneh mengko utawa tambahake tembung anyar!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Apik banget! Sampeyan wis mriksa tembung-tembung kanggo dina iki.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Ketik topik kanggo nggawe ukara latihan khusus mung kanggo sampeyan!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Yen dikosongi, bakal nggawe ukara adhedhasar kosakata sampeyan.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Mbantu kita dadi luwih apik! Dumum ide, laporake bug, utawa njaluk fitur anyar:
dashboard.support_desc: Yen sampeyan seneng karo aplikasi iki, sampeyan bisa ndhukung pangembangane.

onboarding.journey_begins: Perjalanan sampeyan kanggo nguwasani basa diwiwiti ing kene.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Kanggo entuk asil maksimal saka Synaply, kita nyaranake strategi prasaja iki:
onboarding.step1_desc: Tambah udakara 100 tembung sing gegayutan karo siji topik (misal: Bisnis utawa Lelungan) kanggo mbangun konteks sing kuwat.
onboarding.step2_desc: Kuasai tembung-tembung iki liwat pengulangan saben dina nganti dadi bagean saka kosakata sampeyan.
onboarding.step3_desc: Ganti menyang Latihan AI kanggo nggunakake kosakata anyar sampeyan ing ukara lengkap lan kahanan donya nyata.

dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: misal: Tembung kanggo rapat bisnis babagan pemasaran
dashboard.publish_desc: Dumum koleksi {count} tembung iki karo pangguna liyane. Bakal katon ing galeri Dhaptar Umum.
dashboard.inline_add_error: Mangga lebokake tembung asli lan terjemahane
dashboard.save_batch_success: Kasil nyimpen {count} tembung menyang dhaptar sampeyan!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Gagal nyimpen tembung. Mangga coba maneh.
dashboard.no_words_to_save: Ora ana tembung sing bisa disimpen
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Mangga busak tembung duplikat sadurunge nyimpen.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Mangga busak tembung duplikat sadurunge nerbitake.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI lagi ngaso sedhela. Mangga coba maneh mengko!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Wadhuh! Kita ora bisa entuk wawasan AI. Ayo coba maneh!

public_lists.title: Dhaptar Tembung Umum
public_lists.subtitle: Jelajahi dhaptar tembung sing digawe dening pangguna liyane kanggo basa sampeyan.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Goleki dhaptar miturut judhul utawa katrangan...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Coba telusuran liyane utawa ganti filter basa sampeyan.
public_lists.load_error: Kita ora bisa mbukak dhaptar umum saiki.
public_lists.playlists_no_found: Ora ana daftar puter sing ditemokake
public_lists.playlists_no_lists: Ora ana dhaptar umum sing kasedhiya

detail.title: Rincian Dhaptar
detail.added_success: Tembung kasil ditambahake menyang koleksi sampeyan!
detail.added_error: Gagal nambahake tembung menyang koleksi sampeyan.
detail.delete_confirm: Apa sampeyan yakin arep mbusak dhaptar umum iki? Tumindak iki ora bisa dibatalake.
detail.duplicate_error: Ana tembung duplikat ing dhaptar. Mangga busak dhisik sadurunge nyimpen.

profile.terms_welcome: Sugeng rawuh ing Synaply. Kanthi nggunakake layanan kita, sampeyan setuju karo ketentuan iki...
profile.title: Pengaturan Profil
profile.leave_empty: Kosongi yen ora arep ganti sandi
profile.subtitle: Atur informasi pribadi lan pengaturan basa sampeyan
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

best_practice.title: Cara Paling Apik kanggo Sukses
best_practice.strategy_desc: Kanggo pengalaman sinau sing paling efektif, kita nyaranake strategi 3 langkah prasaja iki:
best_practice.step1_desc: Tambah udakara 100 tembung sing fokus ing siji topik (misal: Lelungan utawa Bisnis) kanggo nggawe konteks.
best_practice.step2_desc: Kuasai tembung-tembung iki liwat pengulangan saben dina nganti dadi bagean saka kosakata sampeyan.
best_practice.step3_desc: Ganti menyang Latihan AI kanggo nggunakake kosakata anyar sampeyan ing ukara lengkap lan konteks donya nyata.

getting_started.title: Mulai
getting_started.desc: Synaply yaiku alat kuat sing dirancang kanggo mbantu sampeyan nggedhekake kosakata lan ningkatake katrampilan basa nggunakake pengulangan berjarak lan kecerdasan buatan (AI).
getting_started.step1_desc: Tambah tembung kanthi manual utawa gunakake AI kanggo nggawe dhaptar miturut topik lan level.
getting_started.step2_desc: Gunakake Tinjauan Kosakata kanggo apal tembung nggunakake algoritma FSRS.

manual.title: Entri Manual
manual.desc: Lebokake tembung ing basa sing sampeyan sinaoni lan terjemahane. Sampeyan bisa nambah komentar utawa konteks supaya luwih gampang diapalake.

auto_translate.title: Terjemahan Otomatis
auto_translate.desc: Gunakake fitur "Terjemahan Otomatis" kanggo terjemahan cepet liwat layanan DeepL.

ai_list.title: Pembuatan Dhaptar (Dhaptar Tembung AI)
ai_list.desc: Pilih level (A1-C2) lan topik, banjur AI (Gemini) bakal nyusun dhaptar tembung sing relevan kanggo sampeyan, sing bisa ditambahake menyang kamus kanthi siji klik.

ai_insights.title: Wawasan AI
ai_insights.desc: Kanggo saben tembung, AI bisa menehi sinonim, conto panggunaan, lan tip tata basa.

spaced_repetition.title: Pengulangan Berjarak
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply nggunakake algoritma FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) kanggo ngetung wektu ideal kanggo mbaleni saben tembung.
spaced_repetition.step1: Sampeyan bakal dituduhake tembung ing basa asli.
spaced_repetition.step2: Lebokake terjemahan lan pencet Enter utawa Priksa Jawaban.
spaced_repetition.step3: Yen sampeyan ora eling — klik "Ora eling" kanggo ndeleng jawabane.
spaced_repetition.step4: Algoritma bakal ngetung maneh tanggal tinjauan sabanjure adhedhasar jawaban sampeyan.

ai_practice.title: Latihan AI: Terjemahan Ukara
ai_practice.desc: Fitur iki mbantu nglatih tata basa lan konteks kanthi nerjemahake kabeh ukara sing disusun dening AI khusus kanggo sampeyan.
ai_practice.step2: AI bakal nggawe 5 ukara babagan topik yang dipilih.
ai_practice.step3: Kirimake terjemahan sampeyan lan tampa rincian analisis.
ai_practice.step4: AI bakal nuduhake kesalahan lan menehi saran terjemahan ideal kanthi penjelasan.

dictionary_management.title: Manajemen Kamus
dictionary_management.search: Goleki: Gunakake kolom telusuran kanggo nemokake tembung kanthi cepet ing koleksi sampeyan.
dictionary_management.sorting: Urutake: Deleng dhaptar kabeh tembung sampeyan kanthi pilihan kanggo mbusak.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Busak kabeh tembung: Kemampuan kanggo mbusak kabeh isi kamus sampeyan kanthi siji klik.

progress.title: Kemajuan lan Skor
progress.desc: Skor sampeyan (ing header aplikasi) nampilake jumlah tembung sing kasil diterjemahake kanthi bener. Saya dhuwur skore, saya akeh tembung sing wis sampeyan kuwasani kanthi sukses!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
